title: Dil Bhi Tera Hum Bhi Tere
writer: Arjun Hingorani, Bihari Masand, Janardhan Muktidoot
plot: Panchu Kumtekar lives a near-destitute lifestyle in Bombay along with his school-going brother, Shiri. He makes a living as a con-man, gambling and picking pockets with the assistant of another poverty-stricken male, Choti. He has...
